name: flint
tagline: A self-hosted log viewer for searching and filtering distributed logs
description: Flint is a lightweight self-hosted leveled log viewer designed for distributed systems. It helps developers visualize and search logs across environments with a web UI for filtering and navigation.

features.title: Feature Flag Management
features.description: Enable and disable application features at runtime

features.title: Flag Configuration
features.description: Define feature flags and default states

features.title: Environment Support
features.description: Manage feature behavior across multiple environments

features.title: API Access
features.description: Query feature flag states from applications

features.title: Audit Information
features.description: Track changes made to feature flag configurations
